title: astelia grandis
intro: Astelia grandis, also known as the Astelia or Poor Knights Lily, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the Asteliaceae family. The medicinal properties of Astelia grandis include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional Maori medicine to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, among other health benefits. Astelia grandis is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and internally to support digestive health.
